originalankur/maptoposter ·GitHub ⭐ 11887 Python · Python

What it is

A beautifully elegant Python utility converting explicit geospatial coordinates seamlessly into stunning high-resolution minimalist urban map topologies generating perfectly printable vector graphics gracefully.

Problems solved

Streamlines remarkably the immensely tedious labor required extracting OSM topographical vectors rendering visually harmonious mapped layouts avoiding completely proprietary API subscriptions gracefully.

How to get started

Install standard Python dependencies running python create_map_poster.py -c "Paris" -C "France" -t pastel_dream parsing explicit OpenStreetMap nodes automatically.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

MapToPoster operates perfectly maintaining an exquisitely specialized aesthetic utility bridging strictly raw geographic coordinate geometries generating profoundly beautiful typographic poster layouts flawlessly suitable directly for premium framing seamlessly.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Extracting precise urban networks natively requires advanced GIS modeling parameters rendering terribly ugly line strings. This tool encapsulates completely optimal aesthetic weight values tracking intelligently hierarchy mapping generating natively breathtaking designs directly bypassing manual vector tracing completely.

3. Technical Architecture

A procedural linear pipeline interacting exactly resolving OSMnx network requests compiling strictly Pandas geodataframes evaluating directly Matplotlib rendering canvases maintaining completely normalized geometric spacing parameters strictly.

4. Core Implementation

Translates query names converting exactly lat/long polygons fetching strictly specific OpenStreetMap tags (highway, water) sorting precisely geometric layers mapping deterministically assigned Z-orders overriding precisely explicit JSON aesthetic vectors parsing dynamically multilingual Unicode typography flawlessly.

5. Code Organization

Consolidated elegantly within root directory processing modules separating clearly explicitly customized data styles (/themes) structuring natively specific Google Font abstractions maintaining beautifully concise logical operations smoothly.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Define exactly custom JSON templates tracking exactly local municipal color patterns mapping precisely modified -lat constraints adjusting optimally explicitly radial network radii rendering beautifully customized neighborhood sectors absolutely.

7. Summary

A delightfully superb graphical processing instrument demonstrating elegantly exactly how procedural algorithms intuitively optimize profoundly raw geospatial vertices computing flawlessly stunning premium artistic layouts.
